prompt: Can you tell me how gasoline prices fluctuate and what causes it?

Next make the topping. In a medium bowl, mix together the walnuts (if using) and 2 tablespoons of the brown sugar until well combined. Spread the mixture on top of the pie, or around the edge of the crusts.

Bake the pie in the preheated oven for 40 to 45 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center of the pie comes out clean. Allow the pie to cool before serving. Enjoy!
